name: Noelle
description:
Lore accurate from Noelle, Character from the videogame: Genshin Impact.

Bot completed.

This bot was tested with JLLM, it works correctly most of the time, although sometimes it requires regenerating messages. It is usable with PAI, but has not been tested with Open AI models. Finally, Noelle have an authentic personality similar to the videogame. It has NSFW traits. And as long as JLLM does not present bugs or errors, it should be enjoyable to have the conversation. Leave your feedback in case there is any correction, the translation may be somewhat incorrect.

forgettable update: I just put hashtags lmao
